note: default_axes ships a single generic primary issue stance. The Big Bang initializer is expected to extend this with scenario-specific axes (e.g. 'gig_worker_classification_stance', 'rent_control_stance'). All extension axes must follow the same schema.

anchors.-1: Maximally opposed; treats the proposal as illegitimate and resists by every available means.
anchors.-0.5: Clearly opposed; argues against publicly and supports counter-mobilization.
anchors.0: Neutral or undecided; holds no firm position and may be persuaded either way.
anchors.0.5: Clearly supportive; argues in favor publicly and contributes to mobilization.
anchors.1: Maximally supportive; treats the proposal as a moral imperative and acts accordingly.
